news.headline: Busch Gardens offering special Military Annual Pass for Veterans for a limited time, in addition to active duty military members.
news.summary: In a heartfelt gesture, Busch Gardens Tampa Bay and Busch Gardens Williamsburg have announced their decision to extend the Military Annual Pass to both veterans and active duty military personnel for a temporary period. This move aims to honor the service of these individuals and their families. The initiative applies to a specific time frame and endeavors to show gratitude to all those who have served.

news.headline: SimSpace partners with EY and Cybersecurity Foundation to enhance cyber resilience; host Cyber-EXE Poland event.
news.summary: In Boston on October 24, 2024, SimSpace, a renowned provider of high-fidelity cyber range solutions, joined forces with EY and the Cybersecurity Foundation in Warsaw, Poland. This partnership aimed to establish the foundation for the Cyber-EXE Poland event, a cybersecurity exercise that will enhance participants' skills and preparedness. The event is set to leverage the advanced architecture developed by these entities to simulate real-world cyber threats and scenarios.

news.headline: 2024 FrontLine Report by Gaudenzia shows rise in SUD treatment demand, notably among older adults. Alcohol and opioid use disorders prevalent; highlights need for increased access to lifesaving treatment.
news.summary: Recently released statistics reveal a surge in individuals seeking treatment, with a notable rise in older adults. The data underscores that alcohol and opioid use disorders are the predominant diagnoses upon admission to Gaudenzia treatment facilities. Analysis of regional statistics underscores the necessity for culturally tailored interventions to address this pressing issue.

news.headline: Bluerock Total Income+ Real Estate Fund secures $750M line of credit with JPMorgan, RBC Capital Markets.
news.summary: In New York on October 24, 2024, the Bluerock Total Income+ Real Estate Fund, also known as TI+ and identified by the ticker TIPRX, revealed the completion of a $750 million revolving line of credit agreement with JPMorgan Chase Bank and RBC Capital Markets. JPMorgan will be managing this arrangement, marking a significant financial development for the Fund.

news.headline: Motto Mortgage Community Solutions in Greenville to host grand opening on Nov 15 with food, beverages, live entertainment.
news.summary: A recently launched mortgage brokerage franchise is hosting an event in Greenville to mark the opening of its office. The celebration is set to take place in GREENVILLE, S.C. on Oct. 24, 2024. Motto Mortgage, being the first and only national mortgage brokerage franchise, is welcoming the community to join them for an enjoyable evening filled with food, drinks, and live entertainment.

news.headline: HELP USA appoints 4 experts to board advising on homeless prevention & expanding supportive housing during NYC's crisis.
news.summary: HELP USA, a prominent national organization serving the homeless and developing affordable housing, has recently appointed Dr. Richard Park, Theresa (Terry) Bischoff, Gil Addo, and Ignacio Perez-Pozuelo to its Board of Directors. These individuals, who have diverse backgrounds and extensive experience, are crucial additions as HELP USA navigates its expansion phase and approaches its 40th anniversary. Their election underscores the organization's commitment to ending homelessness.

news.headline: IGS acquires Liquidmetal's thermal spray business, expanding its asset integrity technologies. Richmond, VA - Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia on October 24, 2024, Integrated Global Services, Inc. (IGS), a prominent company specializing in asset integrity and environmental technologies, has confirmed the purchase of Liquidmetal's engineered coatings and materials division.

news.headline: Cornflower Solar to host Job Fair and Meet & Greet at Adams State University in Alamosa, Colo. on Oct. 29, 2024.
news.summary: A local solar company, Cornflower Solar, will be hosting a Job Fair and meet & greet for businesses in Alamosa, Colorado on October 29, 2024. The event will take place at Adams State University and aims to connect job seekers and local businesses with opportunities to support Cornflower Solar & Storage.

news.headline: Macon, GA named best small city in the US for online dating, data from Tinder shows. MRR recorded - number of compatible matches - higher than other small cities.
news.summary: In recent findings released on October 24, 2024, it was revealed that Macon, a city in Georgia, has been identified as the top small city in the United States for successful online dating partnerships. This information was provided to TravelMag.com by Tinder, an online dating platform. The data highlighted Macon's impressive Match Right Rate (MRR), indicating the rate at which users in Macon are able to find compatible partners online. This recognition sheds light on Macon's growing reputation as a location where individuals have a higher chance of forming meaningful connections through online dating.

news.headline: LG earns 2025 AHR Innovation Award for Residential Cold Climate Heat Pump, enhancing efficiency in cold regions.
news.summary: A residential heat pump designed for cold climate regions has been recognized for its efficiency. LG Electronics, a prominent player in air conditioning technologies, received the 2025 AHR Innovation Award in the Sustainable Solutions category for this product. The award was granted in Alpharetta, Georgia on October 24, 2024. LG's heat pump is tailored for use in regions with cold climates, demonstrating exceptional performance in challenging conditions. This recognition highlights the importance of sustainable solutions in the HVAC industry.

news.headline: National Confectioners Association surveys Americans on best way to eat candy corn annually; trend chart reveals changing preferences.
news.summary: In Washington on October 24, 2024, the National Confectioners Association conducted their annual survey, questioning consumers on the optimal method of consuming candy corn during the Halloween season. The data from the past five years indicates a shift in Americans' preferences. This information is crucial for the industry as it impacts production and sales strategies.

news.headline: Orion ends ODM-111 program due to molecule's narrow therapeutic range. Significant setback for company.
news.summary: A recent study reveals that the global population has reached 7.8 billion people, with a significant increase of 80 million individuals compared to the previous year. The data also indicates that urban areas are experiencing rapid growth, with 55% of the population residing in cities and this number is expected to rise. The study highlights the challenges this population surge poses in terms of resource management, infrastructure, and environmental impact, emphasizing the need for sustainable solutions to support the growing population. Experts suggest that investments in technology, renewable energy, and urban planning are crucial to address these challenges and ensure a high quality of life for all inhabitants.

news.headline: Rogers Communications (RCI) reports Q3 earnings beating expectations: $1.04 EPS in USD, C$1.42 EPS in CAD, sales of C$5.129B.
news.summary: Rogers Communication, Inc. (NYSE:RCI) has seen a decrease in its share value following the release of its third-quarter financial results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.04 in U.S. dollars, surpassing the analyst consensus of 98 cents. In Canadian dollars, the earnings per share stood at C$1.42, marking a 12% increase from the previous year. Total quarterly sales amounted to C$5.129 billion, showing a 1% increase compared to the same period last year. The growth in wireless service revenue by 2% was primarily attributed to a rise in mobile phone subscribers over the past year. However, cable revenue experienced a 1% decline this quarter, although it displayed improvements from previous quarters, affected by competitive promotions in the market.

news.headline: Bitcoin futures trading has increased, hitting an all-time high of $32.9 billion. Institutional investors are using cash-and-carry strategy yielding 9.6%.
news.summary: The Bitcoin market has experienced a surge in futures trading, leading to a record high open interest of $32.9 billion. This increase indicates growing leverage and institutional involvement. According to Glassnode, a significant portion of this rise is fueled by a cash-and-carry strategy. This tactic involves traders profiting by holding spot positions while simultaneously shorting futures contracts. Institutional investors have been particularly interested in this trade, as it currently offers a yield of approximately 9.6%, which is almost double the rate provided by short-term U.S. Treasuries. The CME Group has been a key player in facilitating this trend.

news.headline: MPUC approves Minnesota Power's lower rate increase agreement, reducing rates for all customers by 2025; final increase around 4.9%.
news.summary: In Duluth, Minnesota, the Minnesota Public Utilities Commission (MPUC) has recently given its approval to a settlement agreement regarding Minnesota Power's 2024 electric rate proposal. This agreement, reached in April between Minnesota Power, the Minnesota Department of Commerce, Minnesota Attorney General’s Office, and Large Power Intervenors after the initial rate request in November 2023, is set to bring about a reduction in rates for all customers by early 2025. The final approved rate increase stands at approximately 4.9%.

news.headline: Chinese tourism group considers acquiring Haichang Theme Parks in potential deal -Bloomberg.
Gevo (NASDAQ: GEVO) will report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7, 2024, in a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Gevo, Inc. stated today that a conference call is scheduled for November 7, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time (2:30 p.m. Mountain Time) where they will unveil their financial results for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024. The call is set to provide an update on the company's performance during this period. Gevo, Inc. can be found on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol "GEVO".

news.headline: Winpak's Q3 2024 shows revenue of $285.5M (4.3% increase), net income $39.3M, EBITDA $61.6M. Company experienced growth in sales volumes and gross profits. Operating expenses increased affecting overall earnings. Revenue for first 9 months decreased by $20M. Company remains committed to growth with increased dividends and aims for 10% payout ratio in next five years. Cash balance at $516M. Full report on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Winpak Ltd. reported its third-quarter 2024 consolidated results in US dollars. Revenue for the quarter ended September 29, 2024, was $285.5 million, net income was $39.3 million, and EBITDA was $61.6 million. Gross profit margins increased to 32.0% from the same period in 2023. For the year-to-date period, revenue was $845.8 million, net income was $114.1 million, and EBITDA was $178.6 million. The company manufactures packaging materials and machines primarily used for food, beverage, and healthcare applications. Operating expenses increased in Q3 2024, impacting earnings by $1.8 million. Cash and cash equivalents balance stood at $516.0 million at the end of Q3 2024, with a strong operating cash flow of $60.0 million during the quarter. The company also declared increased dividends of 5 cents per common share for Q3 2024.

news.headline: Fed bids for 5-year TIPS total $404.8 mln.
Garrett Motion Q3 sales drop 14%, missing projections at $826M, citing vehicle demand weakness in Europe and China.
news.summary: Shares of Garrett Motion Inc. (NASDAQ: GTX) are down as the company announced disappointing third-quarter results and adjusted its FY24 net sales forecast. Third-quarter sales slumped 14% year-over-year to $826 million, missing the expected $851 million. This decline was primarily attributed to reduced light vehicle sales in Europe and China, intense competition among global OEMs, and short-term effects from customer vehicle platform mix. Factors like pricing adjustments, commodity deflation, and inflation pass-through also affected net sales. Gross profit totaled $166 million, resulting in a gross profit margin of 20.1%, a slight increase from the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA decreased to $144 million from $152 million due to lower volumes, commodity deflation impact on pricing after inflation adjustments, and adverse foreign... (For full story, refer to Benzinga.com)

news.headline: WisdomTree (NYSE: WT) to announce $0.16 EPS on 2024-10-25. Previous earnings beat led to 0.0% stock drop. Shares at $10.16, up 64.81% in a year. Bull hope for positive guidance.
news.summary: WisdomTree (NYSE:WT) is set to announce its quarterly earnings with analysts predicting an EPS of $0.16. Investors will be looking for positive guidance for the next quarter alongside potential earnings beat. In the previous quarter, WisdomTree exceeded EPS estimates by $0.02, resulting in a slight share price drop. Over the past quarters, the company has shown consistent growth in EPS estimates. Shares were trading at $10.16 as of October 23, with a 52-week increase of 64.81%. Analysts stress the importance of staying informed about market sentiments and industry expectations.

news.headline: NYCB to report Q3 earnings on 2024-10-25 with a projected EPS of $-0.39. Investors optimistic for positive guidance.
news.summary: New York Community (NYSE:NYCB) is set to unveil its quarterly earnings on Friday, October 25, 2024. Analysts are expecting an earnings per share (EPS) of $-0.39. Investors are eagerly awaiting the report, hopeful for results exceeding expectations and optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. For more details, new investors are encouraged to read the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nasdaq gains 0.3% while Dow falls 0.72%, Nasdaq at 18,323.75, Honeywell shares drop 4% after Q3 results.
news.summary: U.S. stocks showed mixed performance, with the Nasdaq Composite rising by 0.3%. The Dow dropped by 0.72% to 42,206.88, while the Nasdaq rose by 0.26% to 18,323.75, and the S&P 500 fell by 0.16% to 5,788.23. Consumer discretionary sector shares surged by 2.6%, while materials shares declined by 1.1%. Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) saw a 4% decrease in its stock price after reporting third-quarter results, with revenue at $9.728 billion (6% YoY growth) and adjusted EPS at $2.58. The company revised FY24 sales guidance to $38.6 billion – $38.8 billion and adjusted EPS guidance to $10.15 – $10.25. Nxu, Inc. (NASDAQ:NXU) surged by 216% to $0.7930 on news of a proposed merger, and QuantumScape Corporation (NYSE:QS) also experienced positive movement.

news.headline: MSC Industrial Q4 sales fall 8% to $952.3 million, missing consensus. Net income declines 27.8% to $94.2 million. EPS down 37.2% to $1.03.
news.summary: MSC Industrial Direct Company, Inc. (NYSE:MSM) saw a decline in its shares following the release of its fourth-quarter results. The company reported a decrease in net sales by 8.0% year-over-year, amounting to $952.3 million, falling short of the expected $959.7 million. Average daily sales for the fiscal year also dropped by 4.7%, attributed to weak demand in heavy manufacturing markets where the company holds a significant presence, as well as challenges from non-repeating orders compared to the previous year. Adjusted operating income for the quarter went down by 27.8% to $94.2 million, causing the operating margin to shrink from 12.6% to 9.9% compared to the same period last year. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at $1.03, marking a decrease of 37.2% from the previous year.

news.headline: CBD Life Sciences Inc. (CBDL) set for growth in $70B industry with innovative products, aiming for high returns and becoming a game changer.
news.summary: CBDL, a company operating in a lucrative $70 billion industry, is poised for significant financial gains due to its innovative product range and strategic market positioning. This positions CBDL as a disruptive force in the hemp market, promising exceptional returns for its shareholders.

news.headline: Toll Brothers introducing new luxury homes in Sereno Canyon, Scottsdale, with sales starting in January 2025.
news.summary: Toll Brothers, Inc. revealed plans for the introduction of the new Manor Collection at its Sereno Canyon community in Scottsdale, Arizona. Known for constructing upscale residences, Toll Brothers is currently constructing the Sales Center and model home at 24985 North 125th Place in Scottsdale. Sales for these luxury homes are slated to begin in January 2025. This initiative marks a significant addition to the housing market in Scottsdale, with the luxurious Manor Collection setting a new standard for upscale living in the region.

news.headline: First American named one of Fortune's Best Workplaces for Women™ for the 9th year. (Numbers: 2024, 9 years in a row)
news.summary: First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), a leading provider of title, settlement, and risk solutions for real estate transactions, has been recognized as one of the 2024 Fortune Best Workplaces for Women™ by Great Place To Work® and Fortune magazine. This marks the company's ninth consecutive year on the list, showcasing its commitment to workplace excellence. As a pioneer in digital transformation within the industry, First American continues to prioritize creating a positive and inclusive work environment for its employees.

news.headline: Global carpet flooring market projected to reach $125.3 billion by 2029 from $89.55 billion in 2023, growing at CAGR of 5.76%.
news.summary: A report titled "Global Carpet Flooring Market - Focused Insights 2024-2029" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market for carpet flooring is projected to achieve a value of $125.3 billion by 2029, up from $89.55 billion in 2023, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.76%. There is a significant rise in demand for carpet tiles in the global carpet flooring market due to their practicality and versatility.

news.headline: XTI Aerospace will speak at the ThinkEquity Conference, showcasing their latest technologies and products to a large audience.
Food processing & packaging equipment sector to experience growth opportunities in 2024-2028 due to technologies. - BusinessWire
news.summary: A recent report titled "Growth Opportunities in the Food Processing and Packaging Equipment Sector, Global, 2024-2028" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report examines growth prospects within the food processing and packaging equipment market. It focuses on various application areas such as beverages, fruits and vegetables, dairy products, meat, fish, and poultry, bakery and confectionery items, oils and fats, breakfast cereals, snacks, and pet food. The analysis provides insights into market opportunities in these sectors for the specified period.

news.headline: Israeli Military Chief: There is a possibility for a sharp conclusion to the conflict with Hezbollah in Lebanon.
ComEd receives $50M federal grant for Rockford grid modernization to deliver clean energy in Illinois communities.
news.summary: In Rockford, Illinois, ComEd has been awarded $50 million in federal funding by the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) following a competitive selection process. Governor Pritzker, alongside the Mayor of Rockford and Region 1 Planning Council (R1), announced this partnership aimed at improving the power grid's capacity to supply affordable and clean energy to communities in Illinois. With these funds, ComEd and local collaborators will implement advanced clean energy projects, increase carbon-free energy sources, and enhance the overall sustainability of the region.

news.headline: Epic Hire wins 2024 NC TECH Awards Top Tech Start Ups to Watch, recognition for innovation in tech sector.
news.summary: Epic Hire, based in Raleigh, North Carolina, has won the prestigious NC TECH Awards Top Tech Start Ups to Watch award. This award is part of the NC TECH Awards program presented by NC TECH (North Carolina Technology Association), which honors innovation, growth, and leadership in the tech industry. Epic Hire is a talent marketplace connecting employers and university students, revolutionizing how candidates showcase their skills. The NC TECH Awards is the only statewide technology awards in North Carolina.

news.headline: New ACRM designation by The Institutes helps individuals and organizations build cyber resilience; focuses on cyber risk management.
news.summary: Located in Malvern, Pennsylvania, the Associate in Cyber Risk Management™ (ACRM™) stands out as a unique program focused solely on cyber risk management. This specialized offering distinguishes itself by addressing the critical need for professionals in this field.

news.headline: Dynatrace labeled a Leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Experience Monitoring, after evaluated among 12 vendors.
news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Dynatrace (NYSE: DT) has achieved the status of Leader in the inaugural Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Experience Monitoring. Out of the 12 vendors assessed, Dynatrace was acknowledged for its strong Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. The 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Experience Monitoring can be accessed for free on the Dynatrace website. The company expressed gratitude for its recognition as a Leader in this essential industry evaluation.

news.headline: Viking Therapeutics' stock surges after unveiling weight-loss quad, outpacing Eli Lilly's obesity triplet.
news.summary: Shares of Viking Therapeutics surged on Thursday following the announcement of its weight-loss quad, delivering a setback to Eli Lilly's experimental triple combination for obesity treatment. This news caused Viking Therapeutics stock to skyrocket, signaling a significant market reaction. The competition between the two companies in the obesity treatment sector has attracted investor attention, with Viking Therapeutics gaining momentum. The details shared by Viking Therapeutics have created buzz in the investment community, driving up the stock price. This development highlights the importance of innovation and competitive strategies in the pharmaceutical industry, with Viking Therapeutics making notable progress. Eli Lilly's position in the market faces a challenge from this latest advancement, showcasing the dynamic nature of the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Tesla stock surges 18% as investors view it as an early Christmas gift, bullish sentiments prevail.
news.summary: Investors are eyeing an aggressive early entry into Tesla stock following a significant surge of 18%. This unexpected boost, likened to an 'early Christmas present,' has attracted bullish sentiment among market participants.

news.headline: AI data centers boosting tech infrastructure stocks w/ strong Q3 results. - Investor's Business Daily
news.summary: Tech infrastructure companies supporting AI data centers have reported impressive financial performance in the third quarter. These firms are benefiting greatly from the increasing demand for AI technology, with significant growth in revenue and profits. The success of AI data centers is driving the business of these tech infrastructure stocks, as they continue to attract investors and outperform market expectations.

news.headline: Nasdaq leads bounce as Tesla soars on earnings; Dow Jones lags. Weekly jobless claims fall. - Investor's Business Daily
news.summary: Today, the stock market had a predominantly positive start on Thursday, with the Nasdaq leading the gains as Tesla's stock surged following strong earnings results. The market also saw a decrease in weekly jobless claims. A mix of earnings reports contributed to the overall positive sentiment in early trading. The Dow Jones lagged behind, while other tech players experienced notable breakouts. This highlights a day marked by a flurry of activity in the stock market.

news.headline: GOAT Meme Coin GOAT hits Top 100 on Binance Futures, fast-growing after Solana's BOME, an AI-based token.
news.summary: The Goatse Maximus (GOAT) token, created by artificial intelligence, has emerged as the quickest-growing meme coin, surpassing the popularity of Book of Meme (BOME).

news.headline: AI-generated memecoins are gaining a cult following, with the Department of Divine Shitposting contributing to the hype. Experts warn of a bubble in AI.
news.summary: A new concept is being spread by the Department of Divine Shitposting aiming to generate interest in AI-created religions. Experts in academia are suggesting that AI technology might be experiencing a bubble with uncertain consequences. This development indicates a growing trend towards exploring the intersection of AI and religion, with a widening discussion around the potential risks and rewards of these advancements.

news.headline: MetalCore shifts to Solana utilizing GameShift platform by Solana Labs, inclusive of storefront and payment systems.
news.summary: MetalCore plans to leverage Solana Labs' GameShift platform, which provides a comprehensive solution for in-game transactions. This platform includes a storefront and payment systems to facilitate in-game purchases seamlessly.

news.headline: Former FTX exec praised for cooperation by US govt before sentencing. Singh's help in case against Bankman-Fried emphasized.
news.summary: During sentencing, prosecutors urged Judge Lewis Kaplan to take into account the significant aid provided by Nishad Singh to the government in its case against Sam Bankman-Fried.

news.headline: Mortgage rates have increased for the fourth consecutive week. Discover where renting may be more affordable.
Southwest Airlines reports $0.15 EPS surpassing estimates, revenue hits $6.87 billion, shares drop by 3% due to Boeing delivery concerns despite an Elliott deal.
news.summary: Southwest Airlines Co. saw its shares drop by 3% during Thursday trading in New York, despite the airline surpassing expectations in its third-quarter earnings and reaching a key settlement with Elliott Investment Management. The airline reported an adjusted EPS of $0.15, beating predictions of a breakeven quarter, while revenue stood at $6.87 billion, above the expected $6.735 billion. Southwest credited robust travel demand for the earnings beat. However, concerns over potential Boeing delivery delays dampened investor sentiment. The agreement with Elliott includes a board restructuring, with six new directors joining, five of whom are Elliott's nominees, though Elliott won't achieve majority control. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: NTT DATA Japan partners with Oracle Alloy to enhance sovereign cloud solutions, offering 150+ Oracle Cloud services.
news.summary: Shares of Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) saw an increase in trading on Thursday as NTT DATA Japan announced their selection of Oracle Alloy to aid Japanese organizations in the public and private sectors. This collaboration aims to speed up cloud adoption, ensuring data sovereignty and compliance. Through Oracle Alloy in their data centers, NTT DATA Japan will grant customers access to more than 150 Oracle Cloud Infrastructure services, featuring advanced AI functions. Additionally, Oracle Alloy facilitates Oracle partners in becoming cloud service providers. NTT DATA Japan plans to enhance its sovereign cloud, OpenCanvas, through Alloy in two data centers.

news.headline: Onion recall due to E.Coli linked to McDonald’s Quarter Pounders - 1 death & numerous illnesses reported.
news.summary: Authorities reported that the onions placed on the well-liked burger are believed to be the main cause of an E. coli outbreak that has resulted in the death of one individual and the illness of a significant number of others.

news.headline: Vallourec reports monthly information on voting rights and shares with share capital of €4,761,042.58. Company based in France.
news.summary: VALLOUREC is a French public limited liability company with a Board of Directors and a share capital of €4,761,042.58. The company's registered office is located at 12, rue de la Verrerie in Meudon, France. VALLOUREC is registered on the Nanterre Trade and Companies Register under the number 552 142 200.

news.headline: XPO recognized as one of America's Most Reliable Companies for 2025 by Newsweek, a top transportation provider in North America.
news.summary: In Greenwich, Connecticut, on October 24, 2024, XPO, a prominent freight transportation provider in North America listed on NYSE as XPO, was acknowledged as one of "America's Most Reliable Companies" for 2025 as per Newsweek magazine. This inaugural list celebrates U.S.-based firms known for their persistent service and reliability. Newsweek ranked XPO among the top transportation companies on the list, highlighting its exceptional performance.

news.headline: Mortgage rates rise to 6.54% for the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage, according to Freddie Mac.
news.summary: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, Virginia, disclosed in a report on October 24, 2024, that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) had an average of 6.54 percent, according to its Primary Mortgage Market Survey® (PMMS®).
